channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-18T19:42Z — 995 outages, 47,107 customers, 154 fair-weather, 22 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 1749 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1747 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AES: 1519 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NJ-PSEG: 1448 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
